g.text: Phase 1: Core Environment Architecture
├─ Define observation space: UserState (id, history, preferences)
├─ Define action space: RecommendAction (select 5 items to recommend)
├─ Create types: UserState, ContentItem, RecommendationAction, Reward signals
└─ Build ContentRecEnv class w/ reset()/step()/state() methods
Phase 2: User & Content Simulator
├─ Generate 500 content items (embeddings, metadata, genres)
├─ Simulate user behavior: CTR, watch time, fatigue, novelty preference
├─ Engagement function: P(click) based on similarity + diversity penalty
└─ Temporal dynamics: user state evolves (satisfaction, churn risk)
Phase 3: Three Difficulty Tasks + Graders
Task 1 (Easy): Static CTR Optimization
└─ Reward: click-through rate (0-1 scale), no temporal effects
Task 2 (Medium): Session Engagement + Diversity
└─ Reward: engagement - 0.2 × content_diversity_penalty
Task 3 (Hard): Long-term User Lifetime Value
└─ Reward: cumulative satisfaction - churn_risk_penalty
Phase 4: Baseline Inference Agent
├─ Implement recommendation heuristic (popularity + user similarity)
├─ Build inference.py following OpenAI Client format from example
└─ Generate baseline scores: Easy (0.75), Medium (0.60), Hard (0.40)
Phase 5: Deployment Configuration
├─ Create openenv.yaml with env spec, tasks, observation/action spaces
├─ Write Dockerfile (Python 3.10, dependencies, expose inference.py)
└─ HF Spaces config: app.py with Gradio UI (optional visual demo)
Phase 6: README + Documentation + Deploy
├─ Full environment API docs, reward functions, example usage
└─ Push to HF Spaces (public) + download all files to /outputs
